basic_details.job_title: Pithoragarh Homeguards Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 22 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Pithoragarh Homeguards has officially announced the Male Home Guards Volunteer Recruitment 2026 with 22 openings. The detailed notification was published under Advt No. DC-34/Ho.Ga./2026-27/823. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 18 to 40 years and hold a 10th Pass qualification can now submit their offline applications until 30-06-2026. Direct links to download the notification and application details are shared below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/OBC, Ex-Servicemen, Freedom Fighter dependents as per rules.

qualification.details: Candidates must have passed 10th from a recognized board.

selection_process: Physical Measurement Physical Efficiency Test Document Verification Medical Examination Character Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Pithoragarh Homeguards Male Home Guards Volunteer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: pithoragarh.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Pithoragarh Homeguards Male Home Guards Volunteer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form is 30th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the Male Home Guards Volunteer post?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 40 years as of 01-01-2026. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed the 10th standard from a recognized board to be eligible for the Male Home Guards Volunteer post.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Male Home Guards Volunteer post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 22 vacancies announced for the Male Home Guards Volunteer position in Pithoragarh Homeguards.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Pithoragarh Homeguards Male Home Guards Volunteer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What are the key stages in the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Physical Measurement, Physical Efficiency Test, Document Verification, Medical Examination, and Character Verification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for the Male Home Guards Volunteer post?
faq.answer: The job type for the Male Home Guards Volunteer post is contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Pithoragarh district, which is pithoragarh.nic.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is DC-34/Ho.Ga./2026-27/823.
